message:
feat(freeze): Add N-indexed local helpers and migrate more opcodes (Phase 7)

Add builder helpers for arbitrary-indexed local variable operations:
- emitAddLoc: pop value, add to local (locals[idx] += POP())
- emitGetLocN: PUSH(FROZEN_DUP(ctx, locals[idx]))
- emitPutLocN: { FROZEN_FREE(ctx, locals[idx]); locals[idx] = POP(); }
- emitSetLocN: { FROZEN_FREE(ctx, locals[idx]); locals[idx] = FROZEN_DUP(ctx, TOP()); }

Migrated opcodes:
- add_loc: use emitAddLoc helper (was hardcoded to frame->locals)
- inc_loc: simplified to use emitIncLoc helper
- get_loc8, get_loc: use emitGetLocN helper
- put_loc8, put_loc: use emitPutLocN helper
- set_loc8, set_loc: use emitSetLocN helper

All opcodes now properly support both trampoline and non-trampoline
modes through the builder's CodeGenContext.
